faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a standard protocol that lets AI models connect to external tools — enabling Claude to interact with on-chain data, exchange APIs, and more.
faq.a2: All Skills are completely free. You just need a Claude Desktop account.
faq.q3: What if I run into issues?
faq.a3: Join our Telegram community — someone will help you troubleshoot.

intro.heading: Who is 51?
intro.description: 51 (0x515151) — a hands-on crypto builder. Founder of Hunter Association, co-founder of Dexless. No textbook theory, just tools and lessons from real experience.

openClaw.heading: What is OpenClaw?
openClaw.description: OpenClaw is an open-source collection of AI Skills — MCP tools organized into a ready-to-use arsenal. No digging through docs, no writing configs. Install and go.
